---
title: "Unique Characteristics of Ainu Culture"
description: "A short essay written in Japanese discussing the various unique traits and characteristics of Ainu culture in Japan."
author: "Robert Mullins"
date: 2025-11-14
image: "placeholder.png"

categories: [Japanese, Culture, Ainu]
---

## Overview

Placeholder

::: {.callout-note}
This project was completed as part of JPN1015 Perspectives on Japanese Culture at DCU. 
:::

## Read the full report

[{{< fa file-pdf >}} Read Full Report](/projects/reports/ainu_report.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}

<iframe src="/projects/reports/ainu_report.pdf" 
        width="100%" 
        height="800px"
        style="border: none; border-radius: 8px;">
</iframe>

---
